'''''Real Deal''''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Sailfish]] originally provided by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to [[Jae Juun]] and [[Tarfang]]. Juun sold the vessel to the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] war profiteers [[Emala]], [[Grees]], and [[Sligh]] who used it to supply material to the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] during their border conflict with the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]. The ''Real Deal'' featured a sensor package enhanced with a [[LongEye booster]] that was a hallmark of Calrissian's ship modifications.<ref name="DN III" /> In sublight pursuit, it could outrun [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Dray-class transport|''Dray''-class transport]], the ''[[Swiff]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
